event_description: Attacker at 192.168.56.102 utilized sqlmap to perform SQL injection against the web server.
Attacker deployed PHP webshells (tmpukudk.php, tmpbiwuc.php) to the web directory.
Attacker created unauthorized local user accounts 'user1' and 'hacker' to establish persistence.
Attacker modified firewall rules to permit RDP access from the internal subnet.
Presence of network segment 192.168.56.0 associated with the attacker's infrastructure.
